_import_program_coverage: Import program coverage of the same name
_teaching_pendant_disabled: The teaching pendant has been disabled
_teaching_program_loading: The teaching program is being uploaded, please wait
_right_program: The content on the right side of the current program pops up/hide
_check_point_tips: The teaching point already exists, whether to overwrite the teaching point. To save, click the save button again.
_delete_point_tips: Please confirm whether to delete the teaching point. If you want to delete the teaching point, click the delete button again.
_check_program_backup: Please confirm whether to delete the program backup, if you want to delete the program backup, click the delete button again.
_node_graph_programming_exists: Node graph programming file already exists
_node_graph_programming_overwrite: The node graph programming file already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?
_export_current: If no content is exported, export the current content
_servo_emergency_stop_acc_dec: Servo emergency stop acceleration and deceleration
_clear_error: Click to clear the alarm information
_drag_tips: *The robot will exit automatically 15 minutes after entering the dragging state
_manual_high_speed_tips: This setting speed is fast in manual mode, please set it to a value lower than 8
_confirm_running_program: Confirm to run the current teaching program!
_cover_exists_tips: The teaching point to be saved currently exists in the database, if you want to overwrite it, please click the overwrite button. If you don't want to overwrite, please click the cancel button and re-enter the roll call.
_current_save_point_tips2: It already exists in the database. Please click the overwrite button to overwrite it. If you do not want to overwrite, please click Cancel and re-enter the roll call.
_disable_robot_tips: Are you sure to disable the robot?
_enable_robot_tips: Are you sure to enable the robot?
_confirm_stop_query: Querying, please confirm whether to stop querying
_cons_loading_info: Disconnected from the background, please check the network condition.
_robot_mounting_changed: The robot installation mode has been modified
_robot_mounting_changed_tips: The 360° free installation angle of the robot base has been modified. Is it applied? Cancel will lose the modified data and exit.
_robot_position: Relative extended axis position of robot
_collision_detection_tip: Applicable conditions: If the load quality fluctuates greatly during operation, this strategy is not recommended。
_rebound_mode_tip: The safety factor of each joint can be an integer between 1 and 10. The larger the value, the shorter the rebound distance and the safer it is.
_load_weight_tips: *Input range of centroid coordinate - 1000~1000, unit: mm
_load_joint_tips: *Please confirm that the load has been installed and all joints of the robot are in proper position
_ft_load_location_set: Load centroid coordinates under force sensor
_ft_load_ident: Manual load identification of force/torque sensors
_ft_load_weight_tips: Mass measurement, recording vertical downward data of sensors and tools
_ft_load_location_tips: Center of mass measurement, recording 3 groups of data under different attitudes
_ft_load_auto_ident: Automatic load identification of force/torque sensor
_auto_zero_warning: *The sensor and tool are pointing vertically downward, and the data under the sensor is greater than 1N
_acc_feed_forward_ratio: Acceleration feedforward coefficient setting of each axis
_dyn_feed_forward_ratio: Dynamic feedforward coefficient setting of each axis
_analog_current_voltage_relationship: Welding current voltage linear relationship with output analog
_trans_point_angle_adjustable: The transition point angular velocity is adjustable
_after_weld_interrupt_param_config: Welding interrupt and Resume parameter configuration
_add_driver_load_tip: *Before adding the load driver command, please confirm that the communication configuration is completed in the grinding equipment configuration of the user peripheral configuration
_servo_warning_tip: *Before adding servo instructions, please confirm that the servo drive parameter configuration is completed in the extended axis configuration of the user peripheral configuration
_laser_offset_tips: *The tool teaching point is only allowed to move x, y, z under the base coordinate system to reach
_intersection_coordinate_functions: Three-point and four-point positioning and intersection coordinate functions
_modify_coord_tips: The coordinate system has been modified
_coord_data_confiem_tips: The data has been modified. Click OK to save the modification and apply it. Click Cancel to return.
_resolving_tips: *Resolution setting value: 0: open loop; other values: feedback.
_exaxis_udp_tips: Note: Before loading the extended axis UDP communication, be sure to configure and apply the extended axis coordinate system except for sequence number 0.
_external_force_tips: Note: When turning on, please do not apply external force to the sensor
_udp_communication_interrupted: [Warning] UDP communication has been interrupted, please check the PLC status and physical connection
_udp_communication_packet_loss: [Warning] UDP communication packet loss is abnormal, please check the network status
_exaxis_list_id_tips: *After successful setting, you can check the servo status corresponding to the number in the Servo status bar
_exaxis_list_mode_tips: *If the servo is enabled, please disable it first, otherwise the setting will not take effect
_exaxis_servo_mode_tips: *Adding a control mode setting command will always match the servo enable and disable commands before and after the command.
_activate_torque: Start and stop of Fiault torque system
_cylinder_not_in_place: The electric screwdriver cylinder is not in place, please solve it manually.
_screw_not_in_place: The screw is not in place, please select the processing method.
_float_happened: Float lock occurs, please select the processing method.
_slip_happened: In case of tooth sliding, please select the treatment method.
_free_notice: Note: For free mode, you only need to modify the relevant parameters in the controller parameters.
_3d_callbrat_tips: After generating the calibration program file, teach several different robot poses according to the diagram, and run the calibration file
_same_name_tips: *A file with the same name already exists. Click OK to overwrite the file with the same name.
_same_encrypt_name_tips: *The files of the same name have the same name as the encryption state, which cannot be imported to cover the encryption program.
_delete_file_tips: Please confirm whether to delete the file. To delete the file, click Delete again.
_setdo_tips: *The non blocking (splcsetdo) instruction needs to be used together with the motion instruction, and it has no effect when executed alone
_getdi_tips: *This instruction is generally used for conditional judgment, such as if (getdi (0)==1), if (splcgetdi (0,010000)==1)
_getai_tips: *This instruction is generally used for conditional judgment, such as if (getai (0)>5), if (splcgetai (0,0,510000)==1)
_dofile_call_tips: *ID cannot be repeated in the same program
_segment_tips: *The offset direction of this command is positive x, and it is recommended to use the workpiece coordinate system to calibrate the motion direction as positive x
_move_weld_end_point: Move to the end of the weld
_move_weld_start_point: Move to the starting point of the weld
_ft_guard_tips: *The normal detection range is (current value - minimum threshold, current value+maximum threshold)
_ft_spiral_tips: The following are advanced parameters, and the recommended values are in brackets
_ft_rot_tips: The following are advanced parameters, and the recommended values are in brackets
_ft_lin_tips: The following are advanced parameters, and the recommended values are in brackets
_ft_find_surface_tips: The following are advanced parameters, and the recommended values are in brackets
_get_vir_di_tips: *This instruction is generally used for conditional judgment, such as if (getvirtualdi (0)==1), if (getvirtualtoldi (0)==1)
_get_vir_ai_tips: *This instruction is generally used for conditional judgment, such as if (getvirtualai (0)>5), if (getvirtualtoolai (0)>1)
_modbus_wait_di_setting: Waiting for digital input to be set
_modbus_wait_do_setting: Waiting for digital output to be set
_modbus_coils_value_tips: Write operations require the writing of register values, and the values can only consist of 0 and 1
_modbus_holdregs_value_tips: The input quantity corresponds to the value, e.g. quantity 3, value {22,33,44}
_register_rtu_get_num: Number of registers, coils, discrete quantities
_xmlrpc_double_tips: Example of double array: xmlrpcclientcall（“ http://192.168.58.20:50000/rpc2 ",
_weld_trace_isuplow: Compensation for upper and lower deviations
_weld_trace_tstartlr: Left and right start compensation time
_weld_trace_tstartud: Up and down start compensation time
_weld_trace_stepmaxlr: Maximum compensation amount for left and right each time
_weld_trace_stepmaxud: Maximum compensation amount for up and down each time
_weld_trace_summaxlr: Total left and right maximum compensation amount
_weld_trace_summaxud: Maximum compensation amount in total up and down
_weld_trace_axisselect: Selection of upper and lower coordinate systems
_weld_trace_reference_type: Setting method of upper and lower reference currents
_up_down_reference_current_start: Up and down reference current sampling starts counting
_up_down_reference_current: Upper and lower reference current sampling count
_movedo_once_tip: *Output set time after the start of the movement, output reset time before the end of the exercise, range [0,1000]
_period_compensation_ao_percent: Dead zone compensation value AO percentage
_please_confirm_whether_enter: Please confirm whether to enter system mode
_confirm_blockly_workspace_name: The workspace already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?
_confirm_change_workspace_name: The current program has changed. Do you want to save the changes to this program?
_special_point_tips: *Before leaving the factory, please enter System Settings->General Settings to restore factory settings.
_robot_pack_warning: *Note: Before operating the packaging function, please confirm the surrounding environment and status of the robot to prevent collisions.
_robot_pack_step1: Move the robot to zero point before moving to the packing point
_robot_pack_step2: Confirm that the mechanical zero point of the robot is correct, and that the gaps in the orange circles in each joint are aligned as shown in the figure.
_robot_pack_step3: The robot moves to the packaging point according to the angle of each axis of the packaging process.
_encoder_tips: *Please operate carefully under the guidance of technicians, please remove the robot servo enable before correcting the zero point.
_inertia_sensor_tips: *Please operate carefully under the guidance of technicians
_update_success: Upgrade succeeded, please restart the control box
_backup_tips: *Backup recovery will replace all current user data. Please be careful.
_teach_three_point: Set three points according to the path
_select_main_paogram_tips: *Please test run the main program in program teaching before configuring it
_drag_lock_param: Parameter setting of each degree of freedom
_six_dimensional_force: Six-dimensional force and joint impedance hybrid drag
_in_interference_motion_strategy: Enter the interference zone motion configuration
_in_interference_drag_strategy: Entering the Interference Zone Drag Configuration
_global_speed: The global speed of manual mode and automatic mode is adjusted to
_weld_complete_tips: **The welding procedure is ready, please name the procedure and open the trial run in the procedure teaching
_multi_line_seam: Multi layer and multi pass welding
_multi_tips_1: **The first set of point settings, including welding points and positive x and positive z points
_multi_tips_2: **The second set of point settings, including welding points and positive x and positive z points
_multi_tips_3: **The third set of point settings, including welding points and positive x and positive z points
_multi_tips_4: **The fourth set of point settings, including welding points and positive x and positive z points
_multi_tips_5: **The fifth set of point settings, including welding points, positive x points and positive z points
_multi_tips_6: **The sixth group of point settings, including welding points, positive x points and positive z points
_multi_tips_7: **The seventh set of point settings, including welding points, positive x points and positive z points
_multi_tips_8: **The eighth set of point settings, including welding points and positive x and positive z points
_system_reset_tips: The system will be restored to the factory settings, and the user data will be cleared. Please operate with caution. If necessary, please backup the data first.
_delete_plug_tips: Do you want to delete the plug-in
_program_generate_tip: *After the program is successfully generated, please go to the Teaching Simulation->Program Teaching page to view it.
_user_existed: The user already exists, please re-enter
_workId_digit_integer: The job number is an 10-digit integer
_psd_existed: The password already exists, please re-enter
_button_box_hand_switch_config: Button box hand automatically switches permission configuration
_key_conbination_tips: *The combination key is a combination of the power button and the manual on/off key. Click the icon to switch the sorting mode, and the last combination key is fixed to the manual on/off key. The number of combined key digits is 2 to 10.
_func_config_btn_end: Function configuration of drag button at the end of the robot
_press_drag_tips1: *After pressing the drag button for the first time, you need to complete the set number of button triggers within the set detection time to enter or exit the drag mode.
_press_drag_tips2: *If no drag operation is performed within the set time after entering the drag mode, the drag mode will be automatically exited.
_set_power_off_to_disable: The robot was powered off to enable the configuration
_transition_strategy: Transition strategy between arc and full circle attitude
_ctrl_box_do_mode_after_emergency_stop: Control box DO output mode configuration after emergency stop
_security_board_monitoring_settings: Security board communication status monitoring settings
_pid_cfg_file_tips: The current parameter data source is an import file, click to switch to the machine body
_want_to_continue: The program was interrupted last time. Do you want to continue?
_workpiece_pallet: Do not select B mode when the workpiece is not fully laid on the pallet
_prompt_before_palletizing_config: Before starting the configuration, verify that the station installation matches:
_left_transition_point_tips: *The left station transition point already exists. If you need to modify it, please click 'Set Point'
_right_transition_point_tips: *The right station transition point already exists. If you need to modify it, please click 'Set Point'
_pallet_equipment_configuration_tips: *X, Y, Z are the absolute values of the upper right corner point of the left pallet or the upper left corner point of the right pallet relative to the coordinate value of the robot base coordinate system. Angle is the rotation angle of the robot during installation. It is recommended to be 0 during installation, as shown in the figure.The data shown in the figure is the default initial data.
_warning_existed_formula_tips: Palletizing formula already exist in the current system, and continuing to create will clear the existing configurations, or inherit the current configurations and recreate them.
_is_inherit_config: Inherit the existing configuration and recreate the palletizing formula
_force_sensor_auto: The force sensor automatically turns on after the error is cleared
_controller_protocol_enable: The controller enables the settings from the site protocol
_controller_site_protocol_log_export: The controller from the site protocol log export
_jijmi_chart_data_tip: After successful setup, the chart displays real-time data of the selected parameters
_jijmi_data_analysis_tip: When the data fluctuations in the chart stabilize, stop the identification and obtain the data analysis results
_jisft_data_analysis_tip: After the robot operation ends, stop the identification and obtain the data analysis results
_sji_instruction_1: The single-joint online identification function aims to analyze the quality of the joints by performing uniaxial reciprocating motion on each robot joint.
_sji_instruction_2: The image shows the default joint posture and motion range in the J1 joint identification program, where the white model represents the starting posture and the orange model represents the ending posture. During the identification process, the robot performs cyclic reciprocating motion between the two postures.
_sji_instruction_3: Due to site limitations, there is a possibility of collision within the default posture and motion range, so it is necessary to first teach the starting and ending points.
_sji_instruction_4: When switching the identification strategy and joints, the starting and ending points need to be re-taught.
